intro.text: We offer clear, transparent engagement models designed to align with your project's maturity, scope, and ongoing needs.

model.subtitle: OUR MODELS
model.title: Flexible Engagement Models
model.description: Choose the structure that best fits your business goals.

advantages.title: Fixed Scope
advantages.desc: Defined project, defined price. Best for clear, bounded requirements. We scope the work upfront and deliver against a fixed timeline.

advantages.title: Ongoing Partner
advantages.desc: Retained/dedicated ongoing work. Best for evolving requirements, continuous delivery, and long-term support for your platform.

advantages.title: App Store Ready-Made
advantages.desc: Pre-scoped vertical apps ready for customization. Fixed pricing tiers. Own your app outright with delivery in 5-7 business days.

cta.title: Not Sure Which Model Fits?
cta.description: Let's discuss your requirements and we'll recommend the best approach.
